summary: Plan-only assessment for one open contributor PR. #88581 is a useful non-security feature PR with focused files and passing checks, but it lacks complete merge preflight proof: mergeability is unknown, hydrated issue comments are absent, the prior Codex review is only represented by a summary excerpt, and there is no evidence of a clean current Codex /review. Recommend a repair/preflight pass on the contributor branch rather than merge.

actions.reason: Useful contributor PR should be repaired/preflighted on its editable branch before any merge recommendation.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair/preflight the editable contributor branch for #88581 instead of replacing it. The branch is maintainer-editable, focused, already has tests and docs, and has passing CI, but it needs current mergeability, hydrated comment/review-bot resolution, and a clean Codex /review before merge can be recommended.
repair_candidate.pr_body: Repair/preflight source PR #88581 by BSG2000 for the /name chat command. This should preserve source PR attribution, hydrate and address existing human and bot review feedback, refresh against current main if needed, run a clean Codex /review, and validate with the focused command test plus pnpm check:changed before any merge recommendation.
credit_notes: Preserve BSG2000 as the source PR author for #88581.
If Clownfish needs to push repair commits to the contributor branch or create a replacement PR later, include source PR credit and attribution to https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88581.
